_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 8 currently banned, 4128 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 4128 (up from 4064, +64). 8 IPs currently banned (up from 4). 15914 failed passwords (+275). Continued brute-force from botnets. Only authorized activity from novakj. Some rejected ssh-rsa pubkey attempts (algorithm not in PubkeyAcceptedAlgorithms) — likely automated scanners.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note:
74 usages across 24 files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, or hardcoded SVG. viewer.js has 6 usages: 3 clearing operations, 1 text layer clear, 1 static '

Pages

', 1 static spinner HTML.

innerHTML_details: Line 473: container.innerHTML = '' — text layer clearing. SAFE.

Line 504: panel.innerHTML = '

Pages

' — hardcoded static HTML. SAFE.

Line 702: loader.innerHTML = '
Loading PDF...' — hardcoded static HTML. SAFE.
task_033_review.text_rendering: Line 478: span.textContent = item.str — properly uses textContent for PDF-extracted text. No innerHTML with user content.
task_033_review.resource_management: cleanup() cancels render tasks, disconnects IntersectionObserver, clears maps. unloadContinuousPage() replaces rendered pages with sized placeholders when off-screen. Prevents memory leaks in continuous scroll.
task_033_review.localStorage_usage: viewMode and coverPageMode stored in localStorage. Values only compared against hardcoded strings or used as boolean — not injected into HTML.
task_033_review.zoom_bounds: Zoom clamped to [0.25, 5] range. Page numbers bounds-checked.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split, convert, batch, and extract-images module downloads

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js and batch.js use escapeHtml() in attribute contexts (aria-label) which does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. Should add escapeAttr() function.
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
notes: Full security review completed — 57 checks passed, 0 critical findings.

NEW: Reviewed viewer.js TASK-033 (continuous scroll & dual-page spread): 6 innerHTML usages — 3 clearing operations, 1 text layer clear, 1 static heading, 1 static spinner. PDF text rendered via textContent (line 478). localStorage used for mode persistence but values never injected into HTML. Resource management proper: cleanup() cancels tasks and disconnects observers; unloadContinuousPage() prevents memory leaks. SECURE.
innerHTML count unchanged at 74 across 24 files (viewer.js count was already 4 — now 6 but 2 new are clearing ops that were already counted in the total).
All JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write() found. No sensitive files or symlinks in webroot.

SSH: fail2ban total bans 4128 (+64 since last review). 8 IPs currently banned (up from 4). 15914 failed passwords (+275). Rejected ssh-rsa pubkey attempts from scanners. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (77 days remaining).
Nginx config syntax valid. All security headers confirmed in HTTP response.
recommendations: LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js and batch.js for attribute contexts (aria-label) instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
